feed.title: Lee, Chien-Pang
feed.subtitle: Free style blogging about my day to day problem-solving tasks, most likely in IT areas.

entry.title: Small Footprint of a power editor in initramfs

link.title: Small Footprint of a power editor in initramfs

entry.summary: Have you ever found yourself trapped in a restricted root filesystem where every megabyte has to be weighed? For most people, this is a rarity, but when working with initramfs—the transient filesystem used by the Linux kernel during the boot process—space is everything. A text mode editor is a vital tool for navigating filesystem, debugging problems and changing configurations. However, as a d...

entry.title: I don't have a say
entry.summary: Why bother hussling with blogging on GitHub and put myself in a state where I have to constently struggle with writing and editing? Even at this moment this recurring question lingers in my head. All in all, it’s a combination of multiple factors, numerous instances and mental journeys that happened over the past years; all leading to one question. How do I better controll my own work? To be mo...
